content: Curiosity-driven intrinsic rewards in episodic memory neural planning agents can be re-framed through a hierarchical self-modeling framework where the generic "agent" self-supervises its own episodic memory pruning by rewarding novel memory traces that improve long-horizon planning, rather than just rewarding novel environmental interactions. This creates a self-improving loop where the agent actively curates its own episodic memory bank to boost planning performance over time.
source_topics: neural architecture memory episodic planning agent
trigger_topic: neural architecture memory episodic planning agent
